name: team-feedback-loop-01
title: Team Feedback Loop
author: ilinxa
description: A host-triggered, NON-BLOCKING cooperative feedback layer: a brief (<1s), skippable celebration overlay when team progress advances (milestone / badge / task-complete) + a gentle, dismissible next-task nudge. The board stays fully interactive during a celebration (pointer-events:none except the skip button, no focus trap, timer clamped <1000ms — D-10); reduced-motion is a real static branch. The default flourish is token CSS reveal-up; an opt-in canvas-confetti burst is React.lazy for milestone/badge only, so the default consumer never loads it. Two trigger paths (controlled event prop + imperative celebrate()) funnel into one reducer — newest wins, never stack. Ships shadcn-style: a batteries-included <TeamFeedbackLoop01> plus a headless <TeamFeedbackLoopRoot> + flat parts (Celebration, Nudge) + Tier-C primitives (CelebrationOverlay, NextTaskNudge, lazy ConfettiBurst). D-16: neither this nor team-trophy-shelf-01 triggers the other; the host routes each event kind to one celebrator. Cooperative + team-scoped (D-08): team-subject copy only. Portable — zero next/*, SSR-safe, imports no other registry component. Third component of the gamification-system.
